title: PRISM: Analysis Related Data
author: Chang, Tianyi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repo contains analysis related data including labeled rna spots(mapped genes) and expression matrix derived after segmentation. The data are used in article: 
 PRISM: Multiplexed Profiling of RNA In-Situ through Single-round of Imaging in Three-Dimensional Tissue
steps_raw:
